nasb.text: Now therefore amend your ways and your deeds and obey the voice of the Lord your God; and the Lord will change His mind about the misfortune which He has pronounced against you.

esv.text: Now therefore mend your ways and your deeds, and obey the voice of the Lord your God, and the Lord will relent of the disaster that he has pronounced against you.

cnv.text: 現在，你們要改善你們所行所作的，聽從耶和華你們的　神的話，耶和華就必回心轉意，不把所說的災禍降給你們。

ccb.text: 你们要改邪归正，听从你们上帝耶和华的话，这样耶和华必施怜悯，取消本来要降给你们的灾祸。
